activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static administrative intake review UI for returning Avery Morgan's packet for signed consent before scheduling.
parsed.html:
Administrative intake readiness review

Review the intake packet, confirm required administrative items, and send the next action for scheduling support.

Administrative policy

Schedule only when required administrative forms are complete.

Insurance uncertainty goes to verification staff.

This review is administrative only and does not include diagnosis, triage, or treatment recommendations.
